title: Rename package bin to autob
description: Rename npm bin entrypoint from autobio to autob while keeping dist/cli.js as the emitted executable target.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN package metadata is read THEN bin.autob points to dist/cli.js and bin.autobio is absent; WHEN packed install runs THEN node_modules/.bin/autob --help prints command help; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:7
review_initial_requirements: Verify package bin target exists after build and no stale autobio bin remains.
review_regression_requirements: Run package CLI smoke test, npm run build, and npm test.

title: Rename commander program to autob
description: Update commander metadata so command help and usage use autob as the program name.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN createProgram help is rendered THEN it shows Usage: autob and not autobio; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:10
review_initial_requirements: Verify program.name is autob and command descriptions remain intact.
review_regression_requirements: Run CLI tests, package CLI smoke test, and TypeScript build.

title: Register init command
description: Add the autob init management command and wire it to the configuration wizard flow.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN autob init is invoked THEN it calls the wizard and writes global config through the wizard path; WHEN --help is rendered THEN init is listed; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:9
review_initial_requirements: Verify init command delegates to wizard and does not accept API keys via argv.
review_regression_requirements: Run init and CLI tests plus TypeScript build.

title: Register config show command
description: Add autob config show to display merged configuration with source annotations and redacted secrets.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN autob config show runs THEN it prints merged llm config, source labels, and redacts apiKey; WHEN --help is rendered THEN config show is listed; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:27
review_initial_requirements: Verify config show output includes source annotations and never exposes full apiKey.
review_regression_requirements: Run config and CLI tests plus TypeScript build.

title: Pass loaded config to pipeline commands
description: Load merged JSON config for pipeline commands and pass the resulting client/model into run and infer instead of resolving env variables.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN run or infer command executes THEN it uses loadConfig/createLlmClientFromConfig; WHEN stage-only commands do not need LLM THEN they do not read API keys; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:16
review_initial_requirements: Verify config is loaded only where needed and errors are actionable without leaking secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run CLI, config, inference, E2E tests and TypeScript build.
